items.title: Feature distribution EDA before modeling
items.description: Histogram and boxplot-style views (via ax.hist or pandas wrappers) reveal skew, outliers, and missing-value patterns that inform scaling and imputation.

items.title: Training and validation metric monitoring
items.description: Line plots of loss, accuracy, or learning rate over epochs provide immediate feedback on convergence and overfitting during model training.

items.title: Bivariate feature relationships
items.description: Scatter plots of feature pairs colored by target label help assess linear separability and inform feature engineering before algorithm selection.

items.title: Class balance and categorical summaries
items.description: Bar charts of target or categorical feature counts communicate imbalance that affects stratified splitting and metric interpretation.

items.title: Report and notebook figure export
items.description: savefig with tuned figsize and dpi produces static assets for papers, slides, and experiment-tracking dashboards alongside interactive notebooks.
